sql_array: CREATE TABLE sales (id INT, amount FLOAT, month INT);
INSERT INTO sales (id, amount, month) VALUES (1, 200.5, 1), (2, 150.75, 2), (3, 300.0, 3);
UPDATE sales SET amount = amount * 1.1 WHERE month = 2;
SELECT month, regr_slope(amount, month) AS slope FROM sales GROUP BY month;
SELECT regr_slope(amount, month) AS slope FROM sales WHERE id IN (1, 2, 3);
